Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND: (1) 1st cause of action for fraud- to allege each element of fraud with particularity as to loan modification only; (2) third cause of action for CCC 2924 violation - to allege actionable violation; (3) fourth cause of action for UCL violation- to allege all elements of this cause of action. DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-07-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances - Atty. Michael Maloney of Louis White P.C. (916-333-3613) appearing for plaintiff Frank Stonich opposing party.
Atty. Tina Naicker of Byran Cave LLP (415-675-3400) appearing for defendant JP Morgan Chase Bank, N.A. moving party.

Hearing held, the court rules DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend as to 1st cause of action Fraud - re particularity. 3rd and 6th depend on other causes of action. 4th Negligence to allege duty to offer permanent modification. 5th 2924 violation to allege facts showing defendant did not know nature of breach. 2nd Breach of fiduciary duty is sustained without leave to amend. Prevailing party prepare order. Judge Ronald E Quidachay, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (501/REQ)
